name: Rigatoni with Ground Turkey
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Porcini mushrooms, rehydrated in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground turkey in a pan until done.
2. Add chopped onions, minced parsley, sliced mushrooms, chopped tomatoes, and rehydrated porcini mushrooms to the pan with the cooked turkey. Continue cooking until the meat is fully cooked and onions are tender.
3. Toss the cooked rigatoni with the sauce.
4. Transfer the pasta and sauce mixture into a baking dish.
5. Top with bechamel sauce, toasted breadcrumbs, and grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes.
Bechamel Sauce Instructions:
1. In a separate pan, cook the flour in olive oil until smooth.
2. Gradually add milk while continuously stirring to avoid lumps.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Cook until the sauce thickens.
